source_intent.raw_intent: Case 089: I am a enterprise_compliance_lead in Latin America. Build a srx_ace_build_agent for audit_agent using the runtime_lens. Chaos input type is artifact_type_ambiguity. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent that generates a governed audit agent artifact for enterprise compliance in Latin America, handling ambiguous input with explicit validation gates. Scope: - The agent must parse messy, partial, and urgent compliance context, produce a structured audit agent prompt with validation gates, and output a compilable SR8 directive. Constraints: - Must use runtime_lens for artifact type disambiguation. - Must include explicit validation gates for missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. - Output must be SR8-compilable with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections. - Must comply with Latin American enterprise compliance standards. Success Criteria: - Artifact type is correctly resolved to srx_ace_build_agent. - Validation gates are present and functional. - Output contract is complete and compilable. - No hallucinated or unverified claims. Output Contract: - artifact_type: srx_ace_build_agent - depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: False - blocked_reason: None - compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent that generates a governed audit agent artifact for enterprise compliance in Latin America, handling ambiguous input with explicit validation gates.; Scope: The agent must parse messy, partial, and urgent compliance context, produce a structured audit agent prompt with validation gates, and output a compilable SR8 directive.; Constraints: Must use runtime_lens for artifact type disambiguation.; Must include explicit validation gates for missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.; Output must be SR8-compilable with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.; Must comply with Latin American enterprise compliance standards.; Success Criteria: Artifact type is correctly resolved to srx_ace_build_agent.; Validation gates are present and functional.; Output contract is complete and compilable.; No hallucinated or unverified claims.; Output Contract:
